titleStmt.title: SII 31.54: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 54. (A.R. No. B 246 of 1936.) MALYĀLA, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar in the temple of Śiva in the village.
It is dated Śaka 1213, Khara, Vaiśākha, śu. 15, Thursday corresponding to 1291 A.D. April 15, the weekday being Sunday.

It records that śrī Sarvvēśvarayya, donated his cows (kadupu) each to nine persons namely Gaṇgula Rāmaya, Bāsam Pochana, Mahādēva, Rāmaya sarvvaya, Bābināyami, Muddaya, Gōpaya, Jannaya, and Sōmaya with stipulation to supply ghee daily at the rate of one tavva for the maintenance of nine lamps in the temples of Sarvvēśvaradēva, Bollēśvaradēva at Malyāla and also to the Bhīmēśvara at Drākshārāma. It further states that these cows should not be sold and if they do so, has to pay 12 daṇḍumāḍa to the maṭham and also they should leave 12 calves for the conversion to the bull.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . ja
jayābhyuda
ya śakava¨rṣa
ṁbulu 1213
yagu kharasaṁ
vatsara vaiśā
kha śu 15 gu
malyālanu
sa¨rvvēśvara dēvaraku bollē
śvaradēvarakuṁ Akhaṁḍa dīpā
lu naḍapanu svasti samasta
praśasti sahitulaina svasti
śrī sa¨rvvēśvarayyaṁgāru
tamagaṁgulaku bōyula
nilpi Iccanakramameṭlannanu
gaṁgulaku rāmayaku
Oka kadapu bāsaṁ
pōcanaku kadupu

mahādēvaniki
kadupu rāma
ya sa¨rvvayaku
kadupu bābinā
yuniki kadupu
muddayaku kadpu
gōpayaku ka
dupu jannayaku
kadupu sōma
yakuṁ kasaṁkēkuṁ
kadupu Addhu tō
mmidi kadupulu
gaṁgulāvula
bōyulūnu
dākṣārāma
bhīmanādha dē
vara gaṁgula bō
ppana kadupu
nitya tavveṁḍu ca
maru lekhkhaṁ to
mmidi dīpālakunu

kabbigala pasura
mu Ammalēḍu .
tappi Ammirēni pa
surāna pannirōdaṁ
ḍu māḍlamara
munaku Accu
vāru . kadupu
naṁ paṁdareṁḍu kō
ḍela lekhanu Āṁ
bōtulannēla
guḍeḍluṁgā viḍu
cu vāru kadupu
naṁkuṁ pannikoḍe
vulu vuṭṭinānu Ābō
tulu dannelaguluṁ
gā viḍucuvāru .
Īkramānanē Āca
ṁdrā¨rka sdhāyigā
naḍupucu ssukha
manubhaviṁpuvā
ru Iṁdali Ājānu
sikṣāma vāṭenidi
dēvōdavvaṁśa riddigaṁti di
vvōyujadaṁ sukhaṁ . Iṁ
dāna kulanāśāya graha
narakēṁdra jāta . I da
ślōkālu . jalēvāsdhaḷē tā
rigaṁ pracchata mastakē .
jātravai driśyaṁ tīliṁgiṁ
sa¨rvva tī¨rtthānaṁ tatravē .
nimiṣaṁ nimiṣōddha¨rśana vā
yatra tiṣṭhaṁti yōśiva yō
ginaṁ taddēśaṁ maṁgaḷaṁ .
puṇyaya ti¨rttē tattapō
vanaṁ . śatrūṇā
datta dha¨rmma pālanīyyō
prayatnatāṁ śa
trūrēva bhavaccātu dha¨rmma
sya truṇa ścitē
